description: Hostinger is a global web hosting provider known for offering highly competitive plans, excellent performance, and ease of use. It is focused on democratizing access to the web, making it ideal for both beginners and experienced developers. In recent years, it has heavily integrated Artificial Intelligence (AI) into its tools to simplify website creation and management.

services.title: Shared Web Hosting
services.info: The most economical and popular option. Multiple websites share the resources of a single server. Ideal for personal blogs, small business sites, and portfolios.

services.title: Managed WordPress Hosting
services.info: Optimized specifically for the WordPress CMS, significantly improving its speed and security. Ideal for any website built on WordPress, from blogs to WooCommerce stores.

services.title: Cloud Hosting
services.info: Combines the simplicity of shared hosting with the power and dedicated resources of a virtual server. Ideal for high-traffic websites, large e-commerce stores, and rapidly growing projects.

services.title: VPS Hosting (Virtual Private Server)
services.info: Provides dedicated resources and full control (root access) in a virtualized environment. Ideal for developers, system administrators, and projects requiring custom server configurations or specific software.

services.title: Agency / Reseller Hosting
services.info: Designed for professionals managing multiple client websites. Ideal for web developers, marketing agencies, and freelance designers.

sections.title: AI Website Builder
sections.info: Allows you to create responsive websites from scratch in minutes by dragging and dropping elements, with no coding skills required.

sections.title: Performance and Speed
sections.info: They use NVMe solid-state drives, LiteSpeed Web Servers (LSWS), and an in-house global Content Delivery Network (CDN) to ensure lightning-fast load times.

sections.title: Free Domain and Migration
sections.info: Most annual plans include a free domain name for the first year, plus privacy protection (WHOIS). They also offer an automated, cost-free website migration tool.

sections.title: Comprehensive Security
sections.info: Unlimited free SSL certificates, Cloudflare protection pillar, malware scanner, advanced DDoS protection, and weekly or daily backups.

sections.title: hPanel
sections.info: Unlike traditional cPanel, Hostinger has developed its own panel, which is much more visual, fast, and easy to use for beginners.
